issues.description: Complex type issues in kv_cache.py mypy checks - return types with Tensor | None not properly narrowed
Multiple mypy errors related to type narrowing for optional tensors

sharedStateObservations.content: KV Cache Quantization Type Safety: The KV cache implementation has several mypy type narrowing issues with Tensor | None unions. These are runtime-safe but could be improved with explicit null checks.

notes: Comprehensive TurboQuant-style KV cache implementation. Lloyd-Max quantizer, orthogonal rotation, QJL projection all tested and working. 3-bit key compression achieves >0.99 cosine similarity. 2-bit value compression achieves >0.94 cosine similarity. 55 tests all passing. Implementation follows paper specifications closely.
